LanguageData.PFP_MildPickyEating.label: picky eating (mild)
LanguageData.PFP_MildPickyEating.description: This pawn has eaten the same food category for too long, causing a mild nutritional imbalance. Moving, work speed, and immunity are affected.
LanguageData.PFP_SeverePickyEating.label: picky eating (severe)
LanguageData.PFP_SeverePickyEating.description: This pawn has eaten the same food category for too long, and the picky eating has worsened. Moving, work speed, and immunity are significantly reduced.
LanguageData.PFP_PermanentPickyEating.label: picky eating (permanent)
LanguageData.PFP_PermanentPickyEating.description: This pawn's long-term extremely monotonous diet has caused permanent damage to their physical condition. Moving, work speed, and immunity are greatly reduced.
